objections.description: Search workflow lacks mandatory legal filters (date range, section, signatory, keyword proximity) required for professional DOU research.
objections.suggested_fix: Implement advanced filter sidebar or modal accessible via SearchBar before query execution.

objections.description: Client-side html2pdf export compromises legal fidelity and citation integrity required for official documents.
objections.suggested_fix: Replace with server-side PDF rendering or direct link to original official PDF blob.

objections.description: No visibility into document validity status, corrigenda, or version history which is critical for legal reliance.
objections.suggested_fix: Add validity badge and version history link to featured document card and DocumentPage header.

suggestions.description: Add boolean operator support (AND, OR, NOT) for precise legal query construction.
Implement server-side snapshotting for share-at-position to ensure link permanence.
